Check out some of my thoughts on issues that are important to me and my constituents below. You will find statements on Labour policies, as well as on local campaigns and initiatives.

let’s talk

Book one of my surgery appointments

If you want to book an appointment to discuss any issues that matter to you that I can help with, please complete the form below.

Contact us

This is the official website of Taiwo Owatemi, MP for Coventry North West.

Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To find out if I am your MP click here.

join My Newsletter

Want to know what MPs actually get up to?

Sign up to my newsletter to receive monthly updates on the work that I’ve been doing in the constituency and in Westminster. I also provide updates on key Government policies so you can keep up to date on that too!
